rationale.D1: Confirmed command-based SubsystemBase classes (Shooter, Loader, Pickup, DriveTrain, SwerveModule) with motors instantiated directly in each subsystem; no IO interfaces or swappable implementations exist anywhere in the repo.
rationale.D2: Confirmed command composition and button bindings in RobotContainer (sequential/parallel groups, trigger bindings for Fire/Eat/Spit/ReLoad/DeStick); no Superstructure, no state enums, no centralized coordinator.
rationale.D3: All simulationPeriodic() bodies are empty stubs except DriveTrain which only updates Field2d from odometry; no WPILib physics sim classes (ElevatorSim/FlywheelSim/DCMotorSim) found anywhere.
rationale.D4: No src/test directory and no test files of any kind; the boilerplate build.gradle JUnit5 dependency is present but unused.
rationale.D5: SmartDashboard.put* scattered throughout DriveTrain.periodic and drive(); WPILib DataLogManager started in Robot.java with a few DoubleLogEntry fields declared but only partially used; AdvantageKit is vendored but only the conduit schema Joystick class was imported (unused) — no processInputs or @AutoLog.
rationale.D6: Confirmed 35 PathPlanner path files + 9 .auto files in deploy/, AutoBuilder.configure() called in SwerveModule with PPHolonomicDriveController and real PID constants, AutoBuilder.buildAutoChooser() used in RobotContainer, and AutoBuilder.pathfindToPose() wired to SmartDashboard; no Choreo files.
rationale.D7: Confirmed SwerveDrivePoseEstimator with addVisionMeasurement() called in DriveTrain.periodic using Limelight MegaTag1 getBotPoseEstimate_wpiBlue, with ambiguity (>0.7) and distance (>3m) rejection logic and setVisionMeasurementStdDevs; single camera, no IO abstraction.
rationale.D8: No README, no CI workflows, no formatter/linter configured; team has 4+ seasons of repos tracked (2022-2026) and a library folder ('Icarus') but it is an old season robot repo, not a maintained dependency — basic hygiene only.
